transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I wanted to cancel my appointment with the physiotherapist. I've actually recovered and I don't think I need it anymore.
AGENT: That's great to hear! Glad you're feeling better. Could I get your name to locate the appointment?
CALLER: Pallavi Deshpande. It was for Thursday evening.
AGENT: Yes, Pallavi Deshpande, Thursday 6 PM with Mr. Ganesh Khot. Cancelling this?
CALLER: Yes please. And thank the team for me, they were really helpful last time.
AGENT: Cancelled! I'll pass on your kind words. Take care and stay healthy, Pallavi!
CALLER: Thanks, bye.
